mnemonics: Check Sum: 'Cats Have Soft Underbellies' - Constantly Highlighting Small Unforeseen Errors
Point to Point Protocol: 'Penguins Tighten Own Packs' - Precision Tunneling Outright Necessary
keyPoints: Check Sum: A small value added to the end of a message to ensure data integrity.
Point to Point Protocol: A protocol where data is transmitted directly between two devices without a network layer.
Cyclic Redundancy Check (CRC): A method of error detection using a polynomial equation to calculate a Check Sum.
Block Coding: A technique of dividing data into fixed-length blocks and adding Check Sums to detect errors.
Cyclic Codes: A type of error-correcting code used in block coding to detect and correct single-bit errors.
